case_title: OPTIO SOLUTIONS, LLC, VS. MONIFA TURNER ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPTIO SOLUTIONS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA QUALIA COLLECTION SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, MONIFA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES ONE THROUGH TEN, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-20-2017
